title: Puerto Banus Luxury Motor Yacht Rental: Weekend Costs & Tips 2026
html:
Puerto Banus on the Costa del Sol is the place for a glamorous weekend afloat. Departing from the marina, a 26m Maiora motor yacht costs from €8,000 for two days. BoatHire24, the worldwide marketplace to rent boats or list your own, connects you with verified owners. Expect Mediterranean cruising in 2026.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury motor yacht for a weekend in Puerto Banus?

A weekend charter of a 20-26m motor yacht in high season costs between €6,000 and €14,000. The price covers the vessel, crew, fuel for a typical itinerary, and VAT. To compare options, you can hire a boat through BoatHire24’s transparent listings. Extra costs such as food, drinks, and marina fees are usually added by the owner.

Do you need a licence to rent a motor yacht in Puerto Banus?

No licence is needed when you charter a crewed yacht; the captain holds all required qualifications. Spanish regulations require a valid licence for bareboat rentals of vessels over 8m length or above 15hp. The BoatHire24 operator confirms exact requirements before booking.

Non-EU nationals should carry an International Certificate of Competence if planning a bareboat charter.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Puerto Banus marina is the central departure point. From here you can cruise westward to Marbella’s harbour, east to the Calahonda area, or directly south to the open Mediterranean. The exclusive enclave of Sotogrande, home to La Duquesa marina, lies 20 nautical miles down the coast. Gibraltar’s iconic Rock is visible on a clear day and sits 35 nm away. For a shorter trip, anchor in the bay of Estepona, just 8 nm west.

Which boat to rent for a weekend in Puerto Banus

  1. Maiora 26m motor yacht, perfect for groups of 8-10 who want flybridge luxury and a sun deck; from €8,000 for two days. Browse this luxury yacht listing on BoatHire24 for full specs and availability.
  2. Sunseeker 70 Manhattan, ideal for a stylish couple or small family, sleeping 6+2 crew; from €7,000 for a weekend.
  3. Azimut 68 Flybridge, a sporty option for 4-6 guests who enjoy speed and onboard jets; from €5,500 for two days.
  4. Lagoon 52 catamaran, spacious and stable, sleeping 8 across four cabins; from €6,000 for a weekend, great for families.
  5. Axopar 28 T-Top, a fast, open day boat for 6 guests, licenced for self-drive with the right paperwork; from €1,800 for a full day.

Cost breakdown for a luxury motor yacht weekend in Puerto Banus

  • Shared group charter on a larger vessel per person: from €300 per day, excluding food and drink.
  • Small motorboat (8-10m) half-day with fuel: from €500 to €1,200.
  • Catamaran full-day crewed for 8 guests: from €2,000 to €3,500.
  • Crewed motor yacht 20-26m full weekend (two days): from €6,000 to €14,000.

Best season for motor yacht charters in Puerto Banus

High season runs from June to September when the Poniente wind brings stable, warm conditions. Book in April or October for quieter seas and lower prices, though the Levante wind can blow up to 30 knots at any time.

At a glance

  • Price band: €1,800, €14,000 for a weekend charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 2 days or 8 hours
  • Maximum guests: 10 on a 26m yacht
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a luxury motor yacht for just one day in Puerto Banus?

Yes, many owners offer full-day charters from 10am to 6pm, with prices starting around €3,000 for a 20m vessel.

What is included in the weekend charter price?

Standard inclusions are the yacht, crew, fuel for a set itinerary, and VAT, but food, drinks, and marina berthing fees are typically extra.

How far in advance should I book for a weekend in high season?

Booking two to three months ahead is advised for June to September, as the best yachts are taken early.

Can I host a party or event on a chartered motor yacht in Puerto Banus?

Many owners allow events for an additional fee and subject to capacity limits; always confirm with the operator before booking.

BoatHire24 makes it simple to compare options and secure your Puerto Banus escape. If you own a yacht there, you can list a boat for free on our marketplace and reach thousands of guests worldwide.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
